name: cloud-architecture seed: every catalog entry declares applies_to cloud-architecture
command: n=$(grep -c '^  applies_to: \[cloud-architecture\]' "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/cloud-architecture-sources.yaml"); [ "$n" = "12" ] && echo all-cloud-architecture 1>&2 || { echo "FAIL n=$n" 1>&2; exit 1; }
